name: manifold-mcp
description: Search and read prediction markets, place bets and limit orders, create and resolve markets, and comment on Manifold Markets.

api_key.title: API Key
api_key.description: Manifold Markets API key from your account settings

tools.name: search_markets
tools.description: Search markets by keyword and filters

tools.name: get_market
tools.description: Get full market details including answers and description

tools.name: get_user
tools.description: Get a user's profile by username

tools.name: get_positions
tools.description: Get user positions for a specific market

tools.name: place_bet
tools.description: Place a bet or limit order (supports dryRun)

tools.name: create_market
tools.description: Create a new market (binary, multiple choice, or numeric)

tools.name: close_market
tools.description: Close a market or change its closing time

tools.name: add_liquidity
tools.description: Add mana liquidity to a market

tools.name: get_baseline
tools.description: Get deterministic baseline probability for a market at a past time

tools.name: get_portfolio_pnl
tools.description: Get full portfolio P&L summary with 24h changes
